name: dev-kit
description: Development workflow plugin with structured planning, execution, debugging, and code quality skills

interface.shortDescription: Structured development workflow: clarify, plan, execute, review, debug
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive development workflow plugin providing 12 skills covering the full development lifecycle — from requirement clarification and milestone planning through execution, independent review, debugging, and code quality improvement. Includes discipline frameworks (Karpathy rules, Rob Pike rules) and AI-slop cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this task and create a plan for implementation.
Debug this failing test with systematic root-cause analysis.
Review and simplify the changed code for quality issues.
